The **2019 CS [Golden Spin of Zagreb](/wiki/Golden_Spin_of_Zagreb "Golden Spin of Zagreb")** was held in December 2019 in [Zagreb](/wiki/Zagreb "Zagreb"), [Croatia](/wiki/Croatia "Croatia"). It was part of the [2019–20 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2019%E2%80%9320_ISU_Challenger_Series "2019–20 ISU Challenger Series").[[1]](#cite_note-announcement-1) Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dance](/wiki/Ice_dance "Ice dance").
